zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Hepburn於大約1420年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素時，她的父親Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire39歲，母親Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick33歲。她於1445年與Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素享年76歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安吉可紐頓 安德 易亞斯特 考爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Hepburn于大约1420年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire39岁，母亲Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick33岁。她于1445年与Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年在苏格兰艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素享年76岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安吉可紐頓 安德 易亞斯特 考爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Hepburn was born about 1420, in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, was 39 and her mother, Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, was 33. She married Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie in 1445, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1495, in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 76, and was buried in Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Hepburn est née environ 1420, à Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie en 1445, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1495, à Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Hepburn um 1420 in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire 39 und ihre Mutter Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick 33. Sie hat 1445 in Ayrshire, Scotland Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1495 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Hepburn è nata il circa 1420 nel Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie nel 1445, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1495, nel Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Hepburnが約1420年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアヘイレス カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshireは39歳，母Janet William Borthwick of Borthwickは33歳であった。1445年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでSir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントン カストルで76歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンキルクニュートン アンド エアスト カルダーにて埋葬された。

ko.Kirknewton, Midlothian, Scotland: 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 커크뉴턴 앤드 이스트 캘더
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Hepburn(이)가 대략 1420년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하일레스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1445년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 그린턴 카스틀에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 커크뉴턴 앤드 이스트 캘더에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Hepburn nasceu aproximadamente 1420, em Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie em 1445, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1495, em Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.Upper Town of Saltoun, , Haddingtonshire: уппир тоун оф салтоун, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Kirknewton, Midlothian, Scotland: кирнютон анд эаст калдир, мидлотян, Шотландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Hepburn родилась около 1420 г. в местности хеилесь кастл, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie в 1445 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1495 г. в местности эглинтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности кирнютон анд эаст калдир, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Hepburn nació aproximadamente 1420, en Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Adam Hepburn of Hailes - Sheriff of Berwickshire, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Janet William Borthwick of Borthwick, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie en 1445, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1495, en Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland.
